-- in --
package p

templ wrapper(content func() templ.Component) {
	<div>
		@content()
	</div>
}

templ f() {
	@wrapper(templ() {
		<div class="level1">
			@wrapper(templ() {
				<span>deeply nested</span>
			})
		</div>
	})
}
-- out --
package p

templ wrapper(content func() templ.Component) {
	<div>
		@content()
	</div>
}

templ f() {
	@wrapper(templ() {
		<div class="level1">
			@wrapper(templ() {
				<span>deeply nested</span>
			})
		</div>
	})
}
